Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Karla Davis.
Gary Rosenberg, Esq. for Plaintiff: The Education Resources Institute, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: John McGillicuddy was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas Murray Jr., as follows:
Damages & prejudgment interest $84,070.68
Atty fees $9,000.00
Costs $394.50.
Total judgment $93,465.18.
Judgment signed in open court.
